title: U.P. Opposition pushes social justice, secularism pitch through rallies, conferences
description: While the SP held a rally named ‘Samajwadi Samanta Bhaichara Rally’, in Dadri, Western U.P, March 29, the Congress is holding ‘Sadhbhavna Baithak’ (harmony meetings) and ‘Samvidhan Samvad’ (constitution conference) across the State
